allow: Bash(cat /e/projetos/portal-de-emendas/package.json | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('next:', d.get\('dependencies',{}\).get\('next',''\)\); print\('react:', d.get\('dependencies',{}\).get\('react',''\)\); print\('zod:', d.get\('dependencies',{}\).get\('zod',''\)\); print\('tailwind:', d.get\('devDependencies',{}\).get\('tailwindcss',d.get\('dependencies',{}\).get\('tailwindcss','not found'\)\)\); print\('rhf:', d.get\('dependencies',{}\).get\('react-hook-form',''\)\); print\('recharts:', d.get\('dependencies',{}\).get\('recharts',''\)\); print\('leaflet:', d.get\('dependencies',{}\).get\('react-leaflet',''\)\); print\('lucide:', d.get\('dependencies',{}\).get\('lucide-react',''\)\)")
